full_text:
When doing the analysis:

- Astir on STELLAR is done. Show lower accuracy than Tribus.

 - I played with the parameters provided in the Astir function.
 > What if we update the parameters and try it on Pre & Post /
 > TMA again - will it work? Currently Astir fails totally on
 > both.

- Tribus works partly on the CyTOF TNBC dataset but requires further
 > updates on the logic table. Too many B cells currently and a bit
 > failed on the myeloid.

- No need for pre-processing on STELLAR and CyTOF datasets - no
 > outlier truncation and no transformation. Only specify z-score
 > normalization when running Tribus.

- Repeat 10 times analysis on STELLAR, with \~50% similarity among all
 > results, and \~70% similarity between 2 results. That's a bit low
 > :(

- We need to set seed in Tribus. √

- Also need tunable MAX_PERCENTILE, REQUIRED_CELLS_FOR_CLUSTERING,
 > THRESHOLD_LOW parameters when running Tribus. √

- The accuracy metrics need also to be calculated by each cell type. √

- CELESTA analysis needs to be done, but it is in R

Questions remain to be solved for the manuscript:

- How many figures do we want? This could be answered together with
 > "How many parts do we want to have in the result part".

 - Fig1. For the method part (Already decided), included the
 > overview of Tribus + Napari

 - Fig2. Performance of Tribus on 3 datasets (TMA stellar MIBItof)

the result part".

 - Fig1. For the method part (Already decided), included the
 > overview of Tribus + Napari

 - Fig2. Performance of Tribus on 3 datasets (TMA stellar MIBItof)

 - Scatterplot of tissue; metrics barplot per cell type;
 > Heatmap expression, UMAP

 - Fig3. Compare with other cell-type classification methods

 - Barplot of metrics; marker expression heatmap...

 - Fig4. Tribus on Pre&Post dataset

 - Fig5. Tribus on TMA?

Continue to write the method part - in a fancy way, learn from other
publications

\*Book a meeting with Anniina next week

- Question:

 - Should we introduce tCyCIF in the method section?

 - Should we compare Tribus with other classical clustering methods
 > used for cell type classification? For example, Phenograph?

 - How to put the tutorial online?
